parameters.content:
## Error Budget Daily Writer
Runs hourly and UPSERTs daily remaining error budget minutes into `error_budget_daily` for silver, emerald, gold, golddr, and gold-ha.\

Uses Postgres credential: `N8N database access`.

## Error Budget Daily Writer
Runs hourly and UPSERTs daily remaining error budget minutes into `error_budget_daily` for silver, emerald, gold, golddr, and gold-ha.\

Uses Postgres credential: `N8N database access`.
